---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: page-header
# Projects
:::

A mix of research tools, open-source work, and things built along the way. Some are polished and live; others are works in progress. Remove this page from `_quarto.yml` if you don't need it.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: project-grid

::: project-card
[Live]{.project-status .status-live}

### Project title

Description of your project — what it does, who it's for, and what it contributes.

::: project-tags
[Tag 1]{.project-tag} [Tag 2]{.project-tag} [Tag 3]{.project-tag}
:::

::: project-links
[View project](https://yourprojecturl.com){.project-link}
[GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername/yourrepo){.project-link-secondary}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[In progress]{.project-status .status-wip}

### Project title

Description of your project — what it does, who it's for, and what it contributes.

::: project-tags
[Tag 1]{.project-tag} [Tag 2]{.project-tag}
:::

::: project-links
[Coming soon]{.project-link}
:::
:::

::: project-card
[Planned]{.project-status .status-planned}

### Project title

Description of your project — what it does, who it's for, and what it contributes.

::: project-tags
[Tag 1]{.project-tag} [Tag 2]{.project-tag}
:::
:::

:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
Have a question about any of these, or interested in collaborating? [Get in touch →](contact.qmd)
:::
